description: DeepInspect PhysicsHealthCertificate score to national bridge rating system mappings
notes: All mappings are approximate. DeepInspect is a remote screening tool; national systems require physical inspection.
For worst-component systems (France IQOA, Netherlands NEN 2767), use max(criterion_scores) not the weighted overall score.
For weighted/average systems (Germany DIN 1076, Norway Brutus), use the overall weighted score.
The 'direction' field: 'ascending_risk' = higher number is worse; 'descending_risk' = higher number is better.
Breakpoints use piecewise linear interpolation between listed points.

germany_zustandsnote.svd_axes_note: For S/V/D axis decomposition, see criteria_to_din1076_svd.json
germany_zustandsnote.osa_note: For element-level OSA damage code mapping, see germany-din1076.md

france_iqoa.safety_suffix_note: Append 'S' to any class when any safety-related criterion (rank 10 or 11) scores >= 4.0 with a user-safety finding. Produces: 1S, 2S, 2ES, 3S, 3US.
france_iqoa.input_score_note: IQOA uses worst-component logic. Apply thresholds to max(criterion_scores), not the weighted overall score.

thresholds.description: Défauts mineurs — minor defects, no immediate risk
Défauts importants — significant durability defects, specialized maintenance needed
Défauts graves — serious defects, structural behavior impaired
Défauts très graves — very serious defects, urgent risk to integrity or safety

uk_bci.database: National Highways Structures Asset Data (open data)
uk_bci.bci_critical_note: BCI_Critical is computed from max(criterion_scores) using the same formula. Report both BCI_Ave and BCI_Crit in UK outputs.

condition_bands.20-39: Very poor — urgent intervention; load restriction review

netherlands_nen2767.direction_note: Scale is 1=as-built (excellent), 6=must replace. This is ascending deterioration, not risk. Higher = more deteriorated.
netherlands_nen2767.input_score_note: NEN 2767 uses worst-element logic. Apply to max(criterion_scores).

thresholds.target_label: Slecht (Poor) — serious deterioration, loss of function in progress
Zeer slecht (Very poor) — failure of function, replacement required

assessment_dimensions.intensity: 1 (slight) to 3 (serious) — severity of defect in its affected area

italy_coa.database: AINOP (Archivio Informatico Nazionale delle Opere Pubbliche)

thresholds.description: Significant risk, Level 3 investigation within 6 months
Serious risk, Level 3/4 investigation within 90 days

italy_coa.risk_types_note: DeepInspect currently covers structural and partial hydraulic risk. Seismic and landslide risks require integration of INGV and ISPRA data for full Italian CoA. See italian_coa_mapping.json.
italy_coa.multi_hazard_note: Full Italian CoA = worst-of(structural, seismic, landslide, hydraulic) with upward adjustment if 2+ types >= MEDIUM.

thresholds.target_label: Dobry (Good) — minor aging, all functions intact
Zły (Bad) — load capacity reduced, safety concerns

poland_gddkia.alignment_note: Polish GDDKiA 0-5 is the closest scale to DeepInspect 1-5 of any European system. Simple offset and slight compression only.

norway_brutus.input_score_note: Brutus uses worst-element per-element grades. Map max(criterion_scores) for element-level comparison.

thresholds.target_label: Meget dårlig (Very poor) — serious, safety concerns

norway_brutus.api_note: NVDB object type 60 = bridges. Attribute 'Tilstandsgrad' = condition grade. Public REST API, no authentication required for read access.

thresholds.target_label: Ytliga skador (Surface damage) — superficial, durability slightly affected
Ytliga, spridda skador (Surface, spread) — moderate, functional impact minor
Djupgående skador (Deep damage) — structural material affected, function impaired
Allvarliga skador (Serious damage) — structural safety affected, urgent action

sweden_batman.api_note: Public portal: batman.trafikverket.se. API read-only accounts by application to Trafikverket Kundtjänst.
sweden_batman.scale_note: BaTMan 0-4 is identical in concept to Norway Brutus 0-4. Same thresholds apply.

us_nbi.database: NBI (National Bridge Inventory) — FHWA public dataset
us_nbi.direction_note: NBI is descending risk: 9=excellent/new, 0=failed/out of service.

breakpoints.target_label: Fair — primary structural elements minor defects
Serious — loss of cross section, cracking, spalling
Failed — out of service, beyond corrective action

us_nbi.structurally_deficient_note: NBI rating of 4 or below on deck, superstructure, or substructure = Structurally Deficient (SD). Equivalent to DeepInspect >= 2.9.
us_nbi.scour_critical_note: NBI Item 113 = scour critical status. Separate from condition rating. DeepInspect Criterion 1 score >= 3.5 should trigger scour-critical flag in NBI output.
